items.headline: MCP reconnection is stateful now
items.body: Claude Code 2.1.153 ships stateful reconnection for MCP servers — when the link drops, the session resumes rather than restarting cold. for ADO MCP Server, this matters: Azure DevOps connections can be brittle over long sessions, and cold-restart behavior currently forces re-establishing context. worth testing to see if connection-recovery workarounds can come out.
